title: Wild's Additions
body:
Wild's Additions is a mod that mixes together wacky mod ideas I have into one mod. It currently only has two major features:
- Warped Potions: Adds a warping effect to the game that warps you back to where you drank it when the effect is removed or wears off. The potions are made with Warped Fruit, a brewing ingredient made with Chorus Fruit, Warped Fungus, and Sugar.
- Piggybanks: Adds piggybanks for various materials that will store a specific material and collect interest for you over time. The interest rates and timings can be configured. Each one is made with 5 of it's block material and a brick, except for netherite which is made with a diamond piggybank and 5 netherite ingots.
